about.body:
• Demo Duels use Demo GRAM only.
• Your real GRAM balance is never touched here.
• Demo settlement mirrors the live platform-fee calculation, but creates no real fee or ledger entry.
• Demo results do not enter real leaderboards, referral activation, or community posts.
• Waiting Demo Duels expire after 10 minutes; active rolls use the same 30-second reminder and 60-second timeout.
• If your Demo balance falls below the minimum stake, you can restore it to the training balance.
• When ready, deposit GRAM and play a real duel.
about.title: ℹ️ How Demo Mode works

balance.note: Demo balance is only for Demo Duels. It cannot be withdrawn or used in real GRAM duels.

quick_duel.how_it_works: ⚡ Quick Duel One tap starts the search. We match you with a real player, never the house. 🔍 Matching • Similar stake range: ±20% • Uses your last stake or the minimum • The match screen shows the exact stake reserved from each player ⏱ Timeouts • No opponent in 30 seconds? Refund • No roll in 1 minute? You lose 💰 Payouts • Platform fee: 5% • Winner gets 95% of the pot • Draw returns both stakes Ready? Deposit GRAM and start a quick duel.
quick_duel.no_balance: ⚡ Quick Duel Fast PvP matching with a similar stake. 🎯 Target stake: {amount} GRAM 💰 Balance: {balance} GRAM ❌ Not enough GRAM to start. How it works • We look for a player with a similar stake (±20%) • The match screen shows the exact stake reserved • No opponent in 30 seconds? Your stake returns • You have 1 minute to roll • Winner gets 95% of the pot • Draw means both stakes return Deposit at least {min_stake} GRAM to play.
quick_duel.opponent_found: ⚔️ Opponent found! Final stake: {amount} GRAM 💰 This exact amount is reserved from each player. ⏱ Each player has 60 seconds to roll. A reminder arrives after 30 seconds.
quick_duel.searching: ⚡ Quick Duel 🔍 Searching for opponent... Target stake: {amount} GRAM The final matched stake may vary by up to ±20% and will be shown exactly when a match is found.
quick_duel.waiting: ⏳ Waiting for opponent... Reserved stake: {amount} GRAM ⚡ Quick duel expires in 30 seconds — you'll be refunded automatically if no one joins.

help.fair_play_text: 🎲 Fair Play Guarantee Roll Duel is built on provably fair randomness. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🔒 How it works ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 1. Before each duel, the server generates a secret seed. 2. A SHA-256 hash is published to both players. 3. After rolls, the seed is revealed for verification. 4. Check: sha256(seed) == published_hash ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🎲 Dice rolls ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Telegram built-in dice used (not manipulable). • Results generated by Telegram — not Roll Duel. • Bot cannot influence or predict outcome. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 💰 Payouts ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ • Winner receives 95% of the total pot. • Platform fee: 5% (keeps servers running). • Draws: both players get full refund. • All transactions logged on ledger. ✅ Roll Duel never manipulates outcomes. Contact support if you have any concerns.
help.how_body:
1. Create a duel and choose a GRAM stake.
2. Wait for another player or join an open duel.
3. Each player sends one fresh 🎲 dice message in the bot chat.
4. The higher roll wins the pot.
help.legal_info_text: ⚖️ Legal Information What is Roll Duel? A peer‑to‑peer dice game. Players compete directly — the platform never plays against you. Service fee: 5% of the total pot. Age restriction: 18+ only. No warranty: Use at your own risk. The platform is not liable for losses due to technical failures, user errors, or blockchain network issues. Your responsibility: You are solely responsible for compliance with the laws of your country. Send /terms for the full legal notice.
help.money_flow_text: 💸 How do deposits & withdrawals work? • Deposit (top-up): Only via CryptoBot invoice. You pay the invoice, funds appear on your Roll Duel balance. • Withdrawal: Sent to your CryptoBot balance automatically. If you connect a TON wallet via TON Connect, direct wallet withdrawals will be available in a future update. • Always use the Deposit button — never transfer GRAM directly to any address yourself! After depositing via CryptoBot, your balance is available for duels immediately.
help.money_withdraw: • Withdrawals: Sent to your CryptoBot balance by default. If you connected a TON wallet via TON Connect, future versions will support direct wallet withdrawals.
help.terms_full_text: ⚖️ Terms of Use 1. Nature of service Roll Duel is a peer‑to‑peer dice game. Players wager crypto against each other. The platform takes a fixed 5% service fee for matching and settlement. 2. Not a casino This service is not a casino or bookmaker. We do not offer games against the house. 3. Age restriction You must be at least 18 years old. By using this service you confirm you meet this requirement. 4. Jurisdiction You are solely responsible for determining whether your use of Roll Duel complies with the laws of your country. 5. No warranty The service is provided "as is". We are not liable for any losses including losses due to technical failures, user errors, or blockchain network issues. 6. Responsible play Only play with funds you can afford to lose. If you feel you may have a problem, seek professional help.
help.tips_body:
• Demo Mode uses Demo GRAM and never touches your real balance.
• Use My Chats to manage connected groups and leaderboard posting.
• Use only fresh dice rolls — forwarded dice do not count.
• If a player times out, the duel is settled by backend truth.
help.title: 🎲 Roll Duel — quick guide
help.ton_connect_note: 💡 TON Connect — links your wallet for future direct withdrawals. Deposits and current withdrawals use CryptoBot.

support.contact_bot: • You can also continue in this bot chat if something looks stuck.
support.intro: Questions, bug reports, and product feedback are welcome.
support.notes_group: • If a group looks disconnected, open My Chats and recheck it there.
support.notes_stale: • If something looks stale, refresh and try again.
support.payments_balance: • Withdrawals are sent to your CryptoBot balance automatically after processing.
support.title: 🛟 Roll Duel — Support

tournament.help_text: 🏆 How Tournaments Work 1. Any player creates a tournament with /createtournament <stake> <4|8> Example: /createtournament 5 4 2. Other players join until the bracket is full. 3. Any participant presses Start — the bot automatically pairs players and opens duels. 4. Each bracket match uses the format shown in the tournament card. In Best of 3, the first player to win two rounds advances; tied rounds are replayed. Losers are eliminated. 5. The last player standing wins the entire prize pool (total stakes − 5% fee). 📌 Prize pool example (4 players, 5 GRAM each): Total: 20 GRAM → Fee: 1 GRAM → Champion gets: 19 GRAM ✅ No manual seeding. No complex settings. One entry stake covers the whole tournament. Just stake, join, and play!

info.text: ℹ️ How Deposits and Withdrawals Work • CryptoBot — top up your Roll Duel balance. You pay an invoice, and GRAM is credited to your internal bot balance. • TON Connect — connect your TON wallet for future direct withdrawals and additional features. ⚠️ Direct deposits through TON Connect are not supported yet. After topping up through CryptoBot, you can play and withdraw your available balance under the platform rules.
